specialRule.name: Blessed Visages
specialRule.desc: Each time an enemy unit declares a charge that targets one or more GENESTEALER CULTS units from your army, that enemy unit must take a Leadership test. If failed, until the end of the turn, each time an enemy model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Spiteful Imp
enhancements.desc: Abominant model only. Each time an enemy unit open a Hatchway, if the bearer is within 1" of the Hatchway, roll one D6: on a 3-4 that unit suffers 1 mortal wound, on a 5+ that unit suffers 2 mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Miasmic Fumes
enhancements.desc: Biophagus model only. Each time an attack targets the bearer, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

specialRule.name: Harassing Fire
specialRule.desc: At the end of your Shooting phase, you can select one GENESTEALER CULTS unit from your army that is not within Engagement range of one or more enemy units. If you do so, that unit can attempt to operate one open Hatchway it is within 1" of (if there is one), and can then make a Normal move of up to 3" (regardless of whether it attempted to operate a Hatchway or not). Until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to charge.

enhancements.name: Master Saboteur
enhancements.desc: The first time in a battle that your opponent's army Secures an objective marker while the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6: on a 3+, that objective marker is not Secured by your opponent's army.

enhancements.name: Primary Detonator
enhancements.desc: Once per battle when an enemy unit opens a closed Hatchway, if the bearer is on the battlefield, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, roll one D6: on a 3-4, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound, on a 5+, that enemy unit suffers 2 mortal wounds.

maxFromGroup.description: Only 2 of these support character units may be included in the list.

units.name: Abominant

units.name: Neophyte Hybrids
units.rulesAdaptations: This unit loses the Deep Strike ability. This unit does not split into seperate units in the Form Boarding Squads step.

units.rulesAdaptations: This unit loses the Deep Strike ability.
